name: Honey Nugget Cookie
recipeInstructions:
Preheat the oven to 350 degrees.
Combine the shortening, brown sugar, honey, and eggs in a bowl. Mix well.
Gradually stir in the remaining ingredients until fully incorporated.
Scoop spoonfuls of dough onto an ungreased cookie sheet.
Bake for 10-12 minutes at 350 degrees.
